messages.body: Hi. We need a larger order but want it split across multiple delivery dates.
We can do multiple shipments. What do you need?
KNM Coffee, Assam tea, and copy paper.
12 bags coffee, 30 boxes tea, 50 reams paper.
Coffee $300, tea $360, paper $200. Total $860. How do you want the shipments?
Coffee first — Feb 28. Tea and paper together — march 5.
Shipment 1: 12 bags coffee Feb 28. Shipment 2: 30 tea, 50 paper march 5.
Can we get a discount on the total order?
For orders above $800 we can do 5% — total $817.
Done. PO-2025-11-250. Payment Net 30 from last delivery.
Noted. SO will reference PO-2025-11-250. Payment due Jan 4. I'll send the SO shortly.
Receiving contact +65 9123 4567, Gate B. Same for both deliveries.
Noted on both DOs. Anything else?
